Container.Name: Indexarr
Container.Overview: Indexarr is a self-hosted ASP.NET Core web app for monitoring and automating Prowlarr indexer health. The built-in scheduler runs inside the container background service and does not require UI access.
Container.Requires: A published Docker image for the repository configured above.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Persistent application data, including SQLite database and saved settings.

Config.Name: Backups
Config.Description: Folder where Indexarr writes backup exports before changes.

Config.Name: ConfigPathEnv
Config.Description: Internal path used by Indexarr for persistent configuration and SQLite storage. Keep /config when using the default template.

Config.Name: BackupPathEnv
Config.Description: Internal path used by Indexarr for backup exports. Keep /backups when using the default template.

Config.Name: LogsPathEnv
Config.Description: Internal path used by Indexarr for application logs. Keep /logs when using the default template.

Config.Name: ProwlarrUrl
Config.Description: Base URL of the Prowlarr instance that Indexarr must manage.

Config.Name: ProwlarrApiKey
Config.Description: Prowlarr API key required for health checks and automation.

Config.Name: AutomationEnabled
Config.Description: Enable the built-in background scheduler. Keep true for internal scheduling; set false if you want Unraid cron or User Scripts to orchestrate runs externally.

Config.Name: AutomationIntervalMinutes
Config.Description: Minutes between background automation runs when the built-in scheduler is enabled.
